tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT gpr.number, gpr.closes_linear, li.state as linear_state
FROM github_pull_requests gpr
JOIN linear_issues li ON gpr.closes_linear = li.id
WHERE gpr.state = 'merged' AND li.state != 'done'"}
